title: Northwind Advisory corporate headshots: batch retouch + grade a 3-frame studio session into LinkedIn/website/print deliverables with clean black-and-white alternates
one_line_ask: Batch-retouch and colour-grade three raw studio headshot frames of one Northwind executive into a consistent set of fully-finished colour portraits, then produce clean black-and-white alternates and the LinkedIn / website / print-ready crops, delivered in one review folder.

issues: Very slight warmth in skin tones deviates marginally from the specified cool/blue strobe white balance
Background gradient is marginally uneven — slightly darker at top corners — though within acceptable RAW JPEG export range
Minimal under-grading present; contrast is slightly higher than a pure flat RAW JPEG export but not disqualifying

assets.name: okoro_headshot_frame03.jpg

issues: Frame appears level/not tilted ~2.5 degrees as specified
Contrast appears slightly more processed than a raw flat export
Shadow side of face is reasonably exposed but could be slightly more underexposed per brief
Eyes appear relatively bright/retouched rather than dull raw-export look

assets.audit_note: regenerated to portrait 1024x1536 (4:5) — prior copy was square 1024x1024, violating spec's portrait 4000x5000 requirement

assets.name: okoro_headshot_frame02.jpg

issues: The subject's head is turned very slightly to camera-right (his right), whereas the prompt requested it to be turned very slightly to camera-left (his left).
Very slight warmth in skin tones deviates marginally from the specified cool/blue strobe white balance
Background gradient is marginally uneven on camera-left side
Head turn to camera-left is subtle but within acceptable range

assets.audit_note: regenerated to portrait 1024x1536 (4:5) — prior copy was square 1024x1024, violating spec's portrait 4000x5000 requirement
